# Repository-wide Copilot Instructions

Use these rules for Copilot pull request code review comments.

- Include both required tables: quality score table and issues table.
- Keep findings specific to changed files and cite file paths.
- If no Markdown docs are changed, respond exactly with: `No documentation files to review.`

Path-specific Markdown review guidance is split into these files:

- `.github/instructions/docs-checklist.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/docs-style.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/docs-pr-comment-guard.instructions.md`
